positive: A symmetrical, highly detailed illustration of stylized mythical flora and celestial elements, composed in a central medallion arrangement. Focus on bioluminescent, stylized tropical flowers intertwined with crescent moons and geometric mandalas. The style must be highly contrasted, clean line art with deep negative space, reminiscent of engraved woodcuts or elegant linocut prints. Use a color palette of deep indigo, emerald teal, and shimmering gold accents. The overall composition must have strong, clear silhouettes, high visual contrast, and a flat, graphic quality perfect for screen printing on fabric. Studio quality, vector illustration aesthetic, graphic design for apparel.
negative: blurry, artifacts, noise, text, watermark, logo, poor anatomy, extra limbs, low detail, dirty, messy, sketch, gradient, photographic, realism
